label: Synthetic B1-type — B2C e-commerce, health/supplement niche

meta.description: E-commerce store selling fitness supplements — protein powders, creatine, vitamins, and gym accessories. Sells across own website, Instagram, and Facebook Shop. Targets gym-goers and recreational athletes aged 18–35.

profile.technical_capability: Medium — marketing manager handles tools, external developer for website
profile.ai_openness: Very open — actively looking for tools
previous_ai_attempts: Meta Advantage+ for ad targeting automation

data_availability.data_quality_overall: MEDIUM-HIGH — order history and channel data reliable. HubSpot has contact records but no deal stages used.

processes.name: Multi-channel Order Fulfillment
steps: Order placed on website, Instagram, or Facebook Shop
Orders pulled manually into WooCommerce dashboard each morning
Picked and packed by warehouse staff
Shipped via InPost Paczkomat (primary) or DPD
Tracking sent automatically via WooCommerce email
processes.who_executes: Warehouse team (2 people) + marketing manager for issues

bottlenecks.description: Orders from Instagram and Facebook must be manually checked and entered — no native sync
bottlenecks.time_impact: 30–45 minutes per day of manual data entry

bottlenecks.description: Post-purchase customer questions (dosage advice, compatibility) handled via Instagram DM by marketing manager

top_repeated_questions: How do I take this with other supplements?
Is this product suitable for beginners?
manual_tasks_wanting_automation: Order sync from social channels to WooCommerce
processes.data_available_for_process: WooCommerce export (950 orders). No support ticket log.

processes.name: Performance Marketing Management
steps: Set up and monitor Meta ad campaigns
Analyze weekly performance data (CPA, ROAS, CTR)
Adjust audiences and creatives based on results
Write new ad copy and product content

bottlenecks.description: Campaign performance diagnosis is manual — pulling numbers from Meta, WooCommerce, Mailchimp separately
bottlenecks.time_impact: Half a day per week spent on reporting across platforms

processes.data_available_for_process: Meta Ads data available via dashboard. Mailchimp metrics available. No unified dashboard.
